log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Fire Genasi — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).

→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 15] HIT! 14 damage. Fire Genasi — Unarmored Caster HP: 53/67

→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 17 damage. Fire Genasi — Unarmored Caster HP: 19/67
--- Fire Genasi — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 19/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
